main.description: Confirm a pending policy action (§F22). The pending row's proposed action is materialized as a real `subject_actions` row (actor_kind='moderator'; the moderator takes responsibility by confirming) with the originating rule preserved on `triggered_by_policy_rule` for forensic provenance. Strike values are computed at confirmation time, label emission fires per `[label_emission]`, the pending row's resolution columns transition NULL → 'confirmed', and a single hash-chained `pending_policy_action_confirmed` audit row commits with the subject_actions INSERT, label INSERTs, pending UPDATE, and strike-state UPSERT in one transaction.

pendingId.description: `pending_policy_actions.id` of the pending row to confirm.

note.description: Optional moderator-facing rationale for the confirmation. Stored on the resulting `subject_actions.notes` column and echoed in the audit row's `moderator_note` field.

actionId.description: Primary key of the inserted `subject_actions` row.

resolvedAt.description: Wall-clock the confirmation took effect, RFC-3339 Z.

errors.name: PendingAlreadyResolved
errors.description: The pending row's `resolution` column is already non-NULL (confirmed or dismissed).

errors.name: SubjectTakendown
errors.description: The subject already carries an unrevoked Takedown — confirmation is not permitted under terminal-severity semantics. Defensive against the race between a takedown landing and an in-flight confirm; auto-dismissal-on-takedown should normally have resolved this pending already.

errors.name: InvalidReason
errors.description: The pending's `reason_codes` no longer resolve against the operator's `[moderation_reasons]` vocabulary (config-shifted between proposal and confirmation).
